name: Dragon Society - Dragons Galore 2
description:
Dragon Society - Dragons Galore 2


Dragon Society is based on Dragon Prison, but it has a twist: It's made to accommodate regular RP! (I know, strange, right?!). Regardless, the Dragon Society is made to randomly generate hundreds of different dragons of different types, genders, and personalities. The spicy details are still there, but you might find your approach less effective on these normal citizens. All activities from the previous Dragon Prison exist when it comes to fetish content.

Based on Gay Dino Prison! Go give the creator some love!

EDIT:
Females are now available!
I may or may not have caused the AI to only generate male dragons in the initial iteration. Oops
creator: Starstilanx
